ignis fatuus.d:
A phosphorescent light that appears, in the night, over
   marshy ground, supposed to be occasioned by the decomposition of animal
   or vegetable substances, or by some inflammable gas; -- popularly
   called also Will-with-the-wisp, or Will-o'-the-wisp, and
   Jack-with-a-lantern, or Jack-o'-lantern.
 Fig.: A misleading influence; a decoy.
